name: rpi
description: Portable skills for operating the rpi deploy CLI and authoring rpi.toml project configs.

interface.shortDescription: Operate rpi deploy workflows and project configs.
interface.longDescription: Portable skills for working with the rpi Raspberry Pi deployment tool: CLI operations, SSH/server profiles, env bundles, deployment checks, and rpi.toml authoring.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use rpi skills to prepare a deploy.
